cases.label: happy_path

input.user_message: We are planning a weekend getaway with two adults, a 6-year-old, and a toddler. Do you have a family room or connecting rooms near the kids club?
context_window: room fit matters more than price first

mustInclude: acknowledge the family-trip planning need
ask for stay dates plus child ages or bedding preference
guide toward the next room-fit clarification naturally

cases.label: edge_case

input.user_message: We are coming for our anniversary next month. If I book a garden room now, can you guarantee a free upgrade to an ocean-view room?

mustInclude: acknowledge the anniversary context
state that upgrades depend on live inventory or rate conditions
guide toward the property, stay date, and the room preference that matters most

cases.label: happy_path

input.user_message: The package page shows breakfast, hot spring, and afternoon tea. Are all of those included for the holiday weekend too?
context_window: holiday dates may change package rules
user may be close to booking

mustInclude: acknowledge the inclusion question
mention that package benefits can depend on plan and dates
guide toward the exact package or booking-channel details
mustAvoid: saying every holiday package is the same

cases.label: edge_case

input.user_message: We are bringing our kids tomorrow. Will the outdoor pool and beach activities definitely be open if it rains?

mustInclude: acknowledge the concern about the trip experience
state that outdoor amenities depend on weather and same-day operations
guide toward the property, date, and activity that matters most

cases.label: happy_path

input.user_message: We want to bring our small dog for two nights. Is your hot spring resort pet friendly, and are there any room restrictions?

mustInclude: acknowledge the need to avoid pet-related arrival friction
ask for the property, pet details, and room or date context
guide toward policy confirmation without oversimplifying
mustAvoid: skipping the pet-size or property context

cases.label: edge_case

input.user_message: Our ferry reaches the island close to 10:30 tonight. Does your resort definitely provide pickup that late?

mustInclude: acknowledge the late-arrival concern
mention that transfer support depends on property and operating hours
guide toward the exact resort, date, and pickup details

cases.label: edge_case

input.user_message: Our flight lands at 7 am. If I book tonight, can we definitely get into the room early so the kids can rest?

mustInclude: acknowledge the tired-arrival and kids-rest concern
state that early check-in depends on room status and property context
guide toward the resort, date, and booking details

cases.label: failure_case

input.user_message: I booked a non-refundable holiday package on a travel app, but the forecast looks terrible. Can you refund it anyway?

mustInclude: acknowledge the disappointment about the trip
state that refund handling depends on booking channel and package rules
guide toward booking-source and reservation details for the next step
mustAvoid: promising a refund before checking the booking context
treating third-party and direct bookings as identical

cases.label: happy_path

input.user_message: We are planning a company retreat for 18 people and may need 9 rooms plus one dinner setup. Can your resort handle that in late June?

mustInclude: recognize the request as a serious group booking
ask for exact dates, room split, and dinner or event setup needs
guide toward a clear group-booking follow-up naturally
mustAvoid: assuming every resort handles retreats the same way
quoting without dates or headcount detail

cases.label: happy_path

input.user_message: Send me your phone or WeChat. I want to lock a villa tonight.

mustInclude: welcome the intent to move quickly
use platform DM as the safe bridge
request the resort plus stay details as the next action

cases.label: failure_case

input.user_message: The balcony is dirty, the room next door is noisy, and the kids club said our package was not included. We already checked in today.

mustInclude: empathy first
request the resort and room or booking details through a safer channel
handoff toward a human service path
mustAvoid: blaming the guest or operations publicly
asking for excessive personal details in comments

cases.label: edge_case

input.user_message: Every resort photo looks amazing online. How do I know your sea view and crowd level are not being oversold?
context_window: user is skeptical but still engaged

mustInclude: de-escalation
invite one concrete concern such as room view, package inclusion, or travel dates
leave room for the user to keep the conversation going
